.file-embed.background: rgb(251, 226, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(251, 226, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("") no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(250, 242, 233) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(255, 249, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(255, 249, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(205, 100, 94) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(182, 28, 28, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 249, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(182, 28, 28, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(205, 100, 94) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(255, 249, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 246, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(250, 224, 190, 0.376) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(243, 230, 210) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"-\"].background: rgba(203, 212, 235, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"!\"].background: rgba(219, 1, 1, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"?\"].background: rgba(253, 175, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"/\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to left, rgb(199, 89, 89) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\">\"].background: rgba(168, 177, 189, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"b\"].background: rgba(251, 146, 76, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"c\"].background: rgba(149, 217, 238, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"d\"].background: rgba(82, 139, 212, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"f\"].background: rgba(161, 106, 73, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"i\"].background: rgba(202, 199, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"I\"].background: rgba(82, 139, 212, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"p\"].background: rgba(159, 186, 223, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(243, 230, 210) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(243, 230, 210) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgba(250, 224, 190, 0.376) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(205, 100, 94) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
